name: ATR Trailing Stop
description: Trailing stop at Nx ATR from highest/lowest point since entry.

name: Fixed R:R Bracket
description: Fixed risk-reward ratio. SL and TP set at entry time.

name: Partial Profit (50% at Threshold)
description: Close 50% of position at configurable profit threshold, hold remainder.

name: 3-Level TP System
description: Three take-profit levels: TP1 (60%), TP2 (120%), TP3 (200%) of target distance.

name: End-of-Day Session Flatten
description: Force-close all positions at session end (3:15 PM ET).

name: VWAP Center Reversion Exit
description: Exit when price returns to VWAP center line.

name: MA Crossback Exit
description: Exit when MA crosses back (trend reversal signal).

name: Breakeven Adjustment
description: Move SL to breakeven when price reaches 50% of TP distance.

name: Cut-and-Reverse (Opposite Signal)
description: Exit on opposite entry signal, immediately reverse position.
